reasons: Franco can punish Zhuxin while she is channeling or walking forward to keep Lantern Flare pressure.
Suppression gives a simple answer to a mage who wants continuous zone control.

proof.summary: Zhuxin wants to keep enemies inside Lantern Flare long enough to stack Soul Snare, while Franco can suppress her during the channel pressure window.
worksBestWhen: Franco hides outside Zhuxin's lantern range.
Franco's team follows up during suppression.
Zhuxin has stepped forward to maintain Lantern Flare pressure.
failureCases: Franco hooks a tank instead of Zhuxin.
Franco suppresses without allied burst follow-up.

reasons: Kaja can drag Zhuxin out of her preferred lantern-control position.
This is strongest when Zhuxin walks forward to keep Soul Snare pressure active.

proof.summary: Zhuxin wants controlled spacing and sustained Lantern Flare uptime, while Kaja can suppress and drag her out of that zone.
worksBestWhen: Kaja waits for Zhuxin to step forward.
Kaja enters from an angle outside Zhuxin's main control area.
failureCases: Zhuxin stays outside Kaja's engage range.
Kaja uses suppression on a low-value target before Zhuxin commits.
Zhuxin's team blocks Kaja from reaching her.

reasons: Diggie can reduce the value of Zhuxin's airborne capture and throw sequence.
Zhuxin wants enemies to stay trapped in her control timing, while Diggie protects the team during that timing.

proof.summary: Zhuxin wants to stack Soul Snare into airborne capture, while Diggie can protect nearby allies from the crowd-control payoff.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves ultimate for Zhuxin's capture window.
Diggie positions near the teammates Zhuxin is trying to lift.
Diggie avoids being forced away before Lantern Flare stacks.
failureCases: Zhuxin baits Diggie ultimate before committing Lantern Flare.
Diggie is isolated or forced away from the captured ally.
Zhuxin catches Diggie before he can cast.

reasons: Pharsa can pressure Zhuxin from outside the normal Lantern Flare fight area.
Zhuxin's control becomes weaker when enemies do not need to stand inside her lantern zone to deal damage.

proof.summary: Zhuxin wants enemies to remain in her lantern control area, while Pharsa can attack from long range and force Zhuxin to reposition.
worksBestWhen: Pharsa keeps vision and casts from safe terrain.
Zhuxin has already used movement speed tools.
Pharsa's team blocks dive attempts while she channels.
failureCases: Pharsa flies into dive range without protection.
Zhuxin's team forces Pharsa out before she can channel.
Zhuxin reaches Pharsa first with Lantern Flare pressure.

reasons: Zetian can fight Zhuxin without needing to stay inside Lantern Flare's control area for too long.
Zetian's area pressure and global teamfight utility can interrupt the timing where Zhuxin wants enemies grouped and trapped by Soul Snare.

proof.summary: Zhuxin wants enemies to remain inside her lantern-control area until Soul Snare creates airborne capture, while Zetian can pressure from safer range and use teamfight-wide utility to reduce Zhuxin's setup value.
worksBestWhen: Zetian uses area pressure to force Zhuxin to reposition.
Zetian's team follows up when Zhuxin commits Lantern Flare.
failureCases: Zhuxin reaches Zetian first with Lantern Flare control.
Zetian uses global utility without team follow-up.
Zhuxin's frontline blocks Zetian from pressuring her directly.
